import { useState } from "react"; function ListOnEdit({Name}) { const [isVisible, setIsVisible] = useState(false); const [data, setData] = useState([]); const handleClick = () => { setIsVisible(!isVisible); } return (

{Name}

{isVisible &&
    {data?.material?.map((item,index)=>(
    {item.name}
    ))}
}
); } export default ListOnEdit;
